source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit that adds the score32 HBM controller replay audit and L2 generator hook.

requested_items.objective: Replay the score32 schedule-wrapper HBM burst stream through a deterministic controller model and report the resulting Llama7B latency and energy.

expected_result.reason: The result should show whether deterministic HBM controller replay changes the score32 schedule-wrapper latency, energy, and remaining-abstraction account.
